_comment: Default data-quality checks for dq_check.py. Copy into a job folder and tune per table. Severity is one of: error | warn | info.

whitespace._desc: Leading/trailing/double spaces or tabs in a string value.

broken_hyphenation._desc: Pattern 'word- word' suggesting a line-break hyphenation artifact.

placeholder_values._desc: Bare placeholder strings that should usually become empty/empty-array.

trailing_conjunction._desc: String ends in a conjunction - often a fragment split across Excel rows.

duplicate_array_items._desc: Identical items repeated within the same array.

empty_vs_null._desc: Both empty string and null appear; pick one convention.

numeric_string._desc: A purely numeric value stored as a string (may be intentional, e.g. zero-padded codes).
